title: Provider operational state
description: The committed, CI-validated readiness document for the configured provider (DEC-0019, extended into a fail-closed state machine by DEC-0020). operational_state moves through exactly CONFIGURED_BUT_LIVE_DISABLED -> SMOKE_CALL_AUTHORIZED -> SMOKE_VERIFIED_EXP_DISABLED, and per-state semantic rules pin the credential/console-cap/smoke flags to their permitted values in each state. Two invariants are schema constants that hold in EVERY state and cannot be relaxed by any document edit: general live_invocation_enabled is false (the smoke call runs through a single consumed live-provider-call authorization, never a standing live flag), and exp_0001_executed is false (EXP-0001 requires its own separate later signed approval). The document is digest-bound to the signed provider-policy-candidate so a substituted candidate breaks the binding; the runtime smoke path fails closed unless a valid unconsumed live-provider-call authorization and this state machine both permit exactly one attempt.

operational_state.description: the fail-closed provider readiness state; the semantic layer enforces the flags permitted in each state and forbids skipping or reversing states

provider_policy_candidate_digest.description: must equal the active gateway policy's embedded candidate digest (CI verifies)

live_invocation_enabled.description: pinned false in EVERY state: general/standing live provider invocation is never enabled; the one smoke call runs through a single consumed live-provider-call authorization, not this flag

credential_provisioned.description: true only after the Product Owner personally provisions the Keychain credential; false in CONFIGURED_BUT_LIVE_DISABLED (semantic layer)

console_spend_cap_configured.description: true only after the Product Owner confirms the provider-console USD 60 hard monthly cap; false in CONFIGURED_BUT_LIVE_DISABLED (semantic layer)

smoke_call_completed.description: true only in SMOKE_VERIFIED_EXP_DISABLED, after a validated invocation AND successful reconciliation (semantic layer)

exp_0001_executed.description: pinned false in EVERY state: EXP-0001 execution requires its own separate later signed approval

live_call_request_ref.description: artifact_id of the signed live-provider-call-request; null before authorization

live_call_receipt_ref.description: consumption receipt id of the single-use live-call authorization; null until the smoke call has consumed it exactly once

reconciliation_ref.description: provider-reconciliation-record id; null until reconciliation succeeds
